text:
Hi!
I have installed FreeBSD 7.1 and I have installed Gnome from Distribution on Install Step!
But When i try to start Gnome using gdm and login into My System The Gnome Show splash screen and after 1-2 minutes the menus was apper and after very long time display's icons in my desktop.
what is problem???
thanks.

R.Masoumvand
